LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER THE MICROWAVE WAS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE THE RELAY 1 FAILED AND CAUSED THE ACCIDENT. (DEC. OF SCOTT BUSKE). PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Off Calendar

Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ANNIE WU, ESQ. of Alexander Law Group, LLP, Tel No. 408-289-1776 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. G. RANDY KASTEN, ESQ. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel No. 415-398-0200 appearing for Defendant Bank of America N.A.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Bank of America N.A.'s Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint is overruled. The amended complaint alleges that defendant "manufactured or assembled the product." (Amended Complaint 4:Prod. L-4). The court must take that allegation as true on demurrer. The demurrer is raising factual issues. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Motion To Compel (Control Date)
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Motion To Compel (Control Date) is taken off calendar. The Court granted the motion to compel ex parte on July 9, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether the microwave was defective because the relay 1 failed and caused the accident. (Dec. of Scott Buske). Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Plaintiff Ronne P. Matias Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Whirlpool Corporations Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Annie Wu, of Alexander Law Group, LLP, Tel. 408.289.1776, for plaintiffs;
Peter J. Felsenfeld, of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, Tel. 415.362.6000, for defendants.

Ruling: The Court required parties to appear. The matter was not argued. The parties inform the Court that they have reached an agreement on PLAINTIFF RONNE P. MATIAS' Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Whirlpool Corporation's Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records. The person most knowledgeable or custodian of records shall appear for deposition on July 17, 2015. Additionally, a hearing for Motion to Compel is set on July 23, 2015, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302. Counsel shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)
